name: open-url-fallback-chain
description: Open `url` and try each id from the `browsers` array in order until one succeeds. Halts on the first browser that lands a visible window. Use when the default browser may fail in the current runtime context (sandboxed flatpak portal stale, missing app, runtime mismatch). The `browsers` list is operator-supplied so no browser names are hardcoded in the skill body.
